snippet.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
snippet.description:
“Nachana” is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. 💃🏽🕺🏽
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take over—when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, “Nachana” brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobody’s watching.

🎧 Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by 

JAMESY
https://www.instagram.com/jamesyboy.dg/

VZN
https://www.instagram.com/jhilkeyvzn/

Hennie Baker
https://www.instagram.com/bakerhennie/

Visuals by NFTP  

Producer-Shristi Karki (Shii) 
Director & Editor-Gaurav Bista   
DOP-Newjal Shrestha  Nhuja Shakya  
Production Manager-Shyam Khadka   
Choreographer-Kritika Baral   
Creative Director-Risheek Pradhan  
Assistant Director-Animesh Deep Shankar   
Casting Director-Rajeev Thapa  
Drone & FPV Pilot-Akash Regmi  
Editor-Gaurav Bista   
Coloring-NFTP  
PD/Art Director-Ghanashyam Shrestha  
Asst.Art-Gyanendra Tamang, Mohan Tamang, Shreeniwash Chaudhary,  Nitesh Gupta   
Asst. production-Anup Khadka, Mahesh GM  
Head Gaffer-Ganesh singh Thakuri  
Lights-Photon films and lights   
Camera rental-KathaChitra  
AC-Ganesh & Niraj Chettri  
Light Man-Madhu Khati(Dhrum), Chaudhary Dai And Team
Crane-LightBenders  
Crane Operators-Prashant Yogi, Bijaya Ramtel(Kale)
Crane Taker-Prakash Shudras
Crane Intern-Shantosh Pariyar   
BTS-XYZ   
Costume Designer-Sujan Ratna Pariyar   
Stylist-Sushmita Rijal (suzustyles)  
Costumes By-Veshbhusa Design studio
Sponsors-OV Education, Riva Natural Spring water  

Cast-PREMA LAMGADE, LIL JHOLA, YOGESHBEATS, LIL LHAKEY, Sujal Bhagat, Rajeev Thapa, XuZeyu Lama, Pramod Panta, Anjan Dhakal, 

Dancers-Lakpa Lama, Prithivu Bhujel, Jivan Lama, Suraj Biru, Aman, Alvish Lama, Dinesh, Jivan tamang  

Special Thanks-Shayuj Pokhrel, Abiskar Gautam, Nj Shakya  

Beat produced by Yogeshbeats
https://www.instagram.com/yogeshbeats/

Mix/Master by 4z
https://www.instagram.com/4zboi/

#jamesy #selfmade #nachana

snippet.title: AA BATA AAMA || Movie Official Trailer 2026 || Bipana Thapa, Pradeep, Paul, Simran, Saigrace, Usha
snippet.description:
AA BATA AAMA || New Nepali Movie Official Trailer 2026 / 2082 || Bipana Thapa, Pradeep Rawat, Paul Shah, Simran Pant, Saigrace Pokharel, Usha Uppreti, Rabindra Jha, Gajit Bista etc. || Aa Bata Aama Movie Trailer 2026

==================

AARYA ENTERTAINMENT PVT. LTD PRESENTS

Movie
AA BATA AAMA
- From the Director of HRASHWO DEERGHA

In Cinemas (WorldWide)

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Firfirey | OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO
snippet.description:
Finally releasing 'Firfirey' after 6 years feels a lot, but here we are. I hope this brings back good memories to you as it does to me. This song resonates of pure love and the emotions it holds is immense for me. I can't believe we've come this far.

Thank you for always being a part of the journey !

Written, composed and performed by Yabesh Thapa 

Flute - Shrijan Maharjan
Drums and Additional Percussions - Bikesh Bazra
Mix/Master - Kobid Bazra (Bajra Creation Records)

Visuals by Noisy

Get connected with us
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/?hl=en

#ghaamchhaya

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: WAR MACHINE | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
During the final stage of U.S. Army Ranger selection, an elite team’s training exercise turns into a fight for survival against an unimaginable threat. Watch Alan Ritchson in War Machine on March 6th.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81768525

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

WAR MACHINE | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

Written/Produced/Mixed by Sushant KC
Produced by Uff KC
Mixed/Mastered by Foeseal

snippet.title: Minions & Monsters - Official Big Game Spot (2026)
snippet.description:
Watch the Big Game Spot for Minions & Monsters, a new installment in the animated film franchise distributed by Illumination. The film embarks on a new adventure within the Minions universe with all-new characters in Minions & Monsters, in theaters on July 1.

This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created. 

Minions & Monsters is directed by Academy Award® nominee Pierre Coffin, a director of the first three Despicable Me films and the first Minions film. Coffin has also provided the voice for the Minions since their film debut in 2010. The film is written by Brian Lynch (Minions, The Secret Life of Pets films) and Pierre Coffin and is produced by Illumination’s Academy Award® nominated founder and CEO Chris Meledandri and by Bill Ryan (executive producer, The Super Mario Bros. Movie). The executive producer is Brian Lynch.

Minions & Monsters is in theaters on July 1.

#IGN

snippet.title: I Solved GTA 5's Biggest Mystery With Real Michael
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Subedaar - Official Teaser | Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Subedaar Official Teaser 
Starring Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Saurabh Shukla, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh and Faisal Malik
Directed by Suresh Triveni
Produced by Vikram Malhotra, Anil Kapoor, Suresh Triveni
Written by Suresh Triveni, Prajwal Chandrashekar
An Opening Image Films Production, In association with Anil Kapoor Film & Communication Network

Official Release Date - March 5, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Set in the Indian heartland, the powerful masala action-drama follows Subedaar Arjun Maurya as he grapples with the challenges of leading a civilian life, navigates a strained relationship with his daughter and confronts societal dysfunction. Once a soldier who fought for the nation,
Subedaar must now battle enemies within to protect his home and family.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#subedaar #SubedaarOnPrime #anilkapoor #teaser #officialteaser #movie #primevideoindia

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] ONLY FRIENDS : DREAM ON
snippet.description:
Romeo & Romeo ละครเวทีที่ถูกนำมาดัดแปลงจากวรรณกรรมสุดคลาสสิกอย่าง Romeo & Juliet โดยนักศึกษาชั้นปี 4 แจ็ค (เอิร์ท พิรพัฒน์) ที่อยากตีความใหม่ในบริบทของผู้ชายสองคนที่รักกัน โดยมี ดีน (มิกซ์ สหภาพ) นักแสดงคู่บุญของแจ็คควบตำแหน่งแฟนเก่าที่เพิ่งเลิกกันไปตอนปีสาม และ ราฟฟี่ (บูม ธราธร) เพื่อนร่วมคณะที่แอบชอบแจ็คตั้งแต่ปีหนึ่ง และ อาโนลด์ (จอส เวอาห์) หนุ่มหล่อเอกเต้นที่ ตั้ว (กวิน แคสกี้) รูมเมทของดีน แนะนำให้มาออดิชันเพื่อรับบทเป็น “โรมิโอ” ทั้งสองคน นอกจากนั้นยังมี โรม (อู๋ ธนบูรณ์) หนุ่มคารมดีเอกดนตรีมาร่วมทำละครเวทีเรื่องนี้ด้วย ติดตามเรื่องราวการทำละครเวทีของแก๊งเพื่อนมหาลัยพร้อมกับการทำตามความฝันที่ต้องใช้ใจใน  “Only Friends : Dream On” ทุกวันศุกร์ เวลา 20:30 น. ดูทีวี ช่องวัน31 |  ดูย้อนหลัง แอป oneD ที่เดียว เวลา 21:30 น. เริ่ม 27 กุมภาพันธ์นี้

กำกับซีรีส์ : ภิญญา จู่คำศรี

รายชื่อนักแสดง
เอิร์ท พิรพัฒน์ วัฒนเศรษสิริ  รับบท  แจ็ค
มิกซ์ สหภาพ วงศ์ราษฎร์  รับบท  ดีน
จอส เวอาห์ แสงเงิน  รับบท  อาโนลด์
กวิน แคสกี้  รับบท  ตั้ว
อู๋ ธนบูรณ์ เกียรตินิรันดร์  รับบท  โรม
บูม ธราธร จันทรวรกาญจน์  รับบท  ราฟฟี่   
สุดยอด พัฐสิฏ เพิ่มพูลสวัสดิ์  รับบท  ทิมมี่
นีโอ ตรัย นิ่มทวัฒน์  รับบท  บอสตัน
ฟลุ๊ค ณัฐนนท์ ทองแสง  รับบท  พีท
ป๊อด ศุภกร ศรีโพธิ์ทอง  รับบท  เกมเพลย์

snippet.description:
Rikesh Gurung Keys - Ma Timrai Hu | Official Song

#matimraihu #newnepalisong #lovesongnepali 


Lyrics 

[ Sansar Feriyo Timro Ujyalole 
Man Mandirbho Timro Aagamanle ] - 2 
Badliyeka chhan Mero Ranga Haru 
Kaha Nai Janchhu Ma Timrai Ta Hu 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahirahu la 
Jati Badha , Aayeni Timrai Aghi Hula 

Bihanile Ghaam , Saajhale Juno 
Parkhirahe Jhai Parkhirahu 
Khola Jhai Timi , Kinara Bhaye Ma 
Bagirahnu , Malai Chhoyi Rahanu 

[Maya Yo Sadhai Bhari 
Bagi Bagi Bagi Rahos 
Timimai Timimai 
Sansar Chali Rahos ] - 2 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahula 
Jati Badha Aayeni , Timrai Aghi Hula

snippet.title: O'Romeo:Paan Ki Dukaan | Shahid K,Disha P| Sajid N | Vishal B |Gulzar |Sukhwinder S |Rekha B |Feb 13
snippet.description:
Presenting “Paan Ki Dukaan” song, from the Upcoming Film "O'Romeo'. Starring Shahid Kapoor, Triptii Dimri, Avinash Tiwary, Farida Jalal, Vikrant Massey (Special Appearance), Nana Patekar, Tamannaah Bhatia, Disha Patani, Aruna Irani, Hussain Dalal & Rahul Deshpande.

Sajid Nadiadwala Presents
A Vishal Bhardwaj Film

"O'Romeo"

Produced By Sajid Nadiadwala 
Directed By Vishal Bhardwaj 
Story: Hussain Zaidi
Screenplay By: Vishal Bhardwaj & Rohan Narula
Dialogues by : Vishal Bhardwaj
Director Of Photography: Ben Bernhard BVK, Saurabh Goswami
Choreographer: Jani Master
Creative Producer: Priti Shahani
Associate Producer: Manuj Mittra
Music on T-Series

O’Romeo, Releasing in Cinemas on 13th Feb 2026.

Song Credits:
Song: Paan Ki Dukaan
Composer: Vishal Bhardwaj
Lyrics: Gulzar
Singers: Sukhwinder Singh, Rekha Bhardwaj
Music Arranger and Producer: Meghdeep Bose
Music Assistant: Anant Bhardwaj

Backing Vocalists:
Mandar C. Apte, Santosh Bote, Jitendra Tupe, Janardan Dhatrak,
Arun Kamath, Rajiv Sundaresan, Suhas Sawant, Parvatish Pradeep,
Abin Thomas, Kunwar Anshith, Surabhi Khekale, Shushmita Narayan,
Vasudha Tiwari, Pashmina Pawa, Apurva Nisshad, Shivika Rajesh

snippet.title: Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh
snippet.description:
Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh

𝑨𝒃𝒐𝒖𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝑽𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒐 :-

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldn’t resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

👉 𝑺𝒖𝒃𝒔𝒄𝒓𝒊𝒃𝒆 𝒕𝒐 @𝑹𝑫𝑪𝑴𝒆𝒍𝒐𝒅𝒊𝒆𝒔 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝒎𝒐𝒓𝒆 𝒓𝒐𝒎𝒂𝒏𝒕𝒊𝒄 𝒉𝒊𝒕𝒔 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒏𝒆𝒘 𝒓𝒆𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆𝒔!

🎶 𝑺𝑶𝑵𝑮 𝑪𝑹𝑬𝑫𝑰𝑻𝑺 :-
Singer:  Krish & Kishore Mondal 
Starring: Sanam Johar & Ashi Singh
Lyrics: Kunaal Vermaa
Producer: Durgaram Choudhary
Music Composer: Devv Sadaana
Music Arrangement & Programming: Sharan Rawat
Mixing & Mastering: Bhasker Sarma @ Euphony Studio
©️ Koo Koo Tv 
Digital Partner: RDC Media

𝑳𝑰𝑲𝑬, 💬 𝑪𝑶𝑴𝑴𝑬𝑵𝑻 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒇𝒂𝒗𝒐𝒓𝒊𝒕𝒆 𝒍𝒊𝒏𝒆, 𝒂𝒏𝒅 🔁 𝑺𝑯𝑨𝑹𝑬 𝒊𝒕 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒇𝒓𝒊𝒆𝒏𝒅𝒔.

🎬 𝑪𝑨𝑺𝑻 & 𝑪𝑹𝑬𝑾 :-
Director: Honey
Choreographer: Debu
Director of Photography (DOP): Karan
Project Head: Israr Ahmad
Video Creator: Screenshot Digital

Assistant Directors:
Shivani, Mukesh Tiwari

Still Photography & BTS: Chand Khan
DI (Colorist): Aman Kumar Kashyap
VFX: Mega Motion

Make-up & Hair: Guddu
Casting Director: Mujeeb Khan

Post Production: Screenshot Digital Studio
Editor: Aaditya Jangid
Art Director: Manoj Bhoyar

Production Executive: Ghani
Dressman: Sujeet
Costume Stylist: Adil Apperal
Dancer Costumes: Nishita
Dancer Management: Nikunj

Spot Boys: Anis, Madan

𝑳𝒚𝒓𝒊𝒄𝒔 :
Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye

Na dil se vo yaadein jaayein
Na raaton ko neendein aayein
Aate hain phir khwab kyu
Aate hain kyu khaab
Jo thi tere ishq mein doobi
Un ankhon mein tum le aaye
Aasu behisaab kyu
Aasu behisaab
Khair hai yaaron kam se kam
Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Khair hai yaaron kam se kam
Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Inkaar ke bahaane kayi baar karte karte

Humne wahin lagaya dil
Jahaan dil lagana mana tha
Akhir wahin kiye sajde jahan
Sar jhukana mana tha
Kyu zindagi bita di jahaan pe
ik pal bitaana mana tha
Kyu us gali mein rehte they hum
Jahaan roz jaana mana tha

Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye
Jo duaayein dete they
Haan usi ke hothon se
Aise waise lafz bhi
Humse bole hain gaye

baitho kisi roz tanhai mein
Rakho samne wakt ke aaine
Jo aagea chehra nazar vo kahin
Tumhe bewafa kehke has na pade

Tujhe dil diya istemaal huye
Hai tujhmein bhi dil ye khayaal rahe
Tujhe dil diya istemaal huye
Hai tujhmein bhi dil ye khayaal rahe

Humne jalaaya dil jahaan diye bhi jalaana mana tha
Kar baithe yaad vo chehra jisko bhulaana mana tha
Hum aazmaye gaye magar unhe aazmana mana tha
Humne wahin lagaya dil jahan dil lagana mana tha

Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye
Jo duaayein dete they
Haan usi ke hothon se

Humse bole hain gaye

en.title: Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh
en.description:
Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh

𝑨𝒃𝒐𝒖𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝑽𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒐 :-

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldn’t resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

👉 𝑺𝒖𝒃𝒔𝒄𝒓𝒊𝒃𝒆 𝒕𝒐 @𝑹𝑫𝑪𝑴𝒆𝒍𝒐𝒅𝒊𝒆𝒔 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝒎𝒐𝒓𝒆 𝒓𝒐𝒎𝒂𝒏𝒕𝒊𝒄 𝒉𝒊𝒕𝒔 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒏𝒆𝒘 𝒓𝒆𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆𝒔!

snippet.title: Meri Ujeli (Official Music Video) -  Pahenlo Batti Muni
snippet.description:
Meri Ujeli is an ode to the brightness and warmth we’ve received from all those we have loved and those who have loved us. 

Stream the HQ Audio here: https://silentroar.ffm.to/meriujeli-pbm

Lyrics:
आकाशले त्यागेको पानीको नि
साथी बनिदिने इन्द्रेणी

जङ्गल खरानी भएपछि
टुसाउँछ जुन फूल बसन्त बनी

तिमी, तिमी,
तिमी, तिमी

शहरको चर्‍को कोलाहललाई
चिरेर गाउने सुस्केरी
गल्ली-गल्लीभित्रका चोकसरी
एक पहेली हौ, नयाँ दुनियाँ पनि

तिमी, तिमी,
तिमी, तिमी

बसन्तको गोँधूलीको अँगालोसरी
न्यानो छौ तिमी
मेरी उजेली

जूनकी सङ्गिनी, बगैँचाझैँ रङ्गीली,
कथाझैँ छौ तिमी, मेरी उजेली

मेरी उजेली तिमी, मेरी उजेली
मेरी उजेली तिमी, तिमी मेरी उजेली

snippet.title: Ed Sheeran - Shape of You (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🎧 Ed Sheeran - Shape of You (Lyrics)
🔔 Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

⏬ Download / Stream: https://open.spotify.com/track/7qiZfU4dY1lWllzX7mPBI3

Ed Sheeran:
https://www.instagram.com/teddysphotos/
https://www.facebook.com/EdSheeranMusic

Lyrics: Shape of You - Ed Sheeran

The club isn't the best place to find a lover
So the bar is where I go (mmmm)
Me and my friends at the table doing shots
Drinking fast and then we talk slow (mmmm)
And you come over and start up a conversation with just me
And trust me I'll give it a chance now (mmmm)
Take my hand, stop, put Van The Man on the jukebox
And then we start to dance
And now I'm singing like
Girl, you know I want your love
Your love was handmade for somebody like me
Come on now, follow my lead
I may be crazy, don't mind me
Say, boy, let's not talk too much
Grab on my waist and put that body on me
Come on now, follow my lead
Come, come on now, follow my lead (mmmm)
I'm in love with the shape of you
We push and pull like a magnet do
Although my heart is falling too
I'm in love with your body
Last night you were in my room
And now my bedsheets smell like you
Every day discovering something brand new
I'm in love with your body
Oh I oh I oh I oh I
I'm in love with your body
Oh I oh I oh I oh I
I'm in love with your body
Oh I oh I oh I oh I
I'm in love with your body
Every day discovering something brand new
I'm in love with the shape of you
One week in we let the story begin
We're going out on our first date (mmmm)
You and me are thrifty, so go all you can eat
Fill up your bag and I fill up a plate (mmmm)
We talk for hours and hours about the sweet and the sour
And how your family is doing okay (mmmm)
And leave and get in a taxi, then kiss in the backseat
Tell the driver make the radio play
And I'm singing like
Girl, you know I want your love
Your love was handmade for somebody like me
Come on now, follow my lead

Every day discovering something brand new

snippet.title: I Became King of the Unstable SMP
snippet.description:
After Lettuce paused the Unstable SMP election and declared himself the interim leader, he captured me and my best friend Theo. Now I have to start from scratch, escape, save Theo, and defeat Lettuce. This is How I Became King of the Unstable SMP. 

Unstable SMP:
➜ ‪  ‪@wemmbumc 
➜ ‪  ‪@FlameFragsMC 
➜ ‪  @Spokeishere 
➜ ‪  ‪@ParrotX2 

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @TheobaldTheBird @LettuceK @Boosfer @PurpledMC @wemmbumc @FlameFragsMC @Spokeishere @jumperwho @minutetechmc @JadenMAN @PrinceZam @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @Leowook 

Original Music by @tsynphonia

snippet.title: Tamang Selo - Figure Timro Dami · फिगर तिम्रो दामी - Official MV
snippet.description:
https://www.tiktok.com/@kumarbmzn  https://www.facebook.com/Kumarbmzntamang 

“𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” · 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 | 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿 | 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻 | Ashish Manandhar | Rasmila Tamang.

          After the amazing response to the “𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴, we are excited to present the 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼. This release is a result of the immense love, support, and encouragement from all our viewers and listeners. We hope you enjoy this visual presentation just as much as you enjoyed the audio. Your continuous support motivates us to create more music and creative content in the future.
       
This music video features 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 and 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿 in the lead roles. Ashish Manandhar is a highly talented dancer, experienced dance instructor, and versatile model. The video highlights 𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿, which has become a major attraction of the song. Representing the Tamang community, 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 is a beautiful and hardworking model, widely recognized for her impressive performances in popular music videos. The music video is 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝗛𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶, an accomplished director known for delivering several superhit Nepali songs. 
     
🎤 This is also the 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁-𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝘂𝗲𝘁 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗯𝘆 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 and 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿, with the song written by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻, making it a special and memorable collaboration for everyone involved.

🎧 Enjoy the perfect blend of a catchy melody, dancing vibe, witty lyrics, and pure Nepali vibes.
 
Please don’t forget to 𝗟𝗶𝗸𝗲, 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗲, 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗯𝗲 and leave your valuable feedback in the comments below.
Thank you for the continued love and support ❤️

Presented by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗺𝘇𝗻  | Music Distribution Partner 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗸.

♫ 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁:
✎ Lyricist: Kumarbmzn 
♪ Music Composer: Bishwo Dong 
🎙 Singer: Bishwo Dong and Shanti Shree Pariyar
🎸 Music Arranger: Bishwo Dong
🎛️ Mixing Master: Dipesh Pradhan
🎧 Rec.: Dong Studio 

🎬 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁:
🎭 Artist: Rasmila Tamang | Ashish Manandhar 
🎞 Production Manager: Milan Katwal
🧥Wardrobe : Valentino The Boutique 
💅🏻 MUA: Sarita Prajapati
🎥 Cinematographer: Nabaraj Uprety
𓀤𓀥 Viral Step By: Ashish Manandhar
✂ Edit | Color | GFX: Manoj Karki
📽 Choreography | Direction: Mausam Himali 
🖼️ Post Production: Luminous Postwork

The video highlights 𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿, which has become a major attraction of the song. Representing the Tamang community, 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 is a beautiful and hardworking model, widely recognized for her impressive performances in popular music videos. The music video is 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝗛𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶, an accomplished director known for delivering several superhit Nepali songs. 
     
🎤 This is also the 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁-𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝘂𝗲𝘁 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗯𝘆 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 and 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿, with the song written by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻, making it a special and memorable collaboration for everyone involved.

🎧 Enjoy the perfect blend of a catchy melody, dancing vibe, witty lyrics, and pure Nepali vibes.

snippet.title: Franklin Traps ALL DEADLY GHOST Inside Evil Watch in Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱
snippet.description:
#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi #gta5mods 

Franklin Traps ALL DEADLY GHOST Inside Evil Watch in Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱

In this story, Shinchan and Franklin get trapped inside another world created by the Evil Watch. The demon inside the watch traps them and takes Shinchan away with him. To save Shinchan, Franklin must trap all the ghosts and monsters that were released from the Evil Watch back inside it. These include Granny, Huggy Wuggy, Mr. Meat, Choo-Choo Charles, Kamla , and the Pennywise. Will Franklin be able to save Shinchan or not? Watch the full scary story to find out!

Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/nessfitgamer01?igsh=MTBudmpzZGdnZXljNg==

I hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did please consider to like the video and subscribe the channel. ❤️

Some 3D assets and mods are sourced from community modders and are used for fan-made cinematic purposes.
No ownership is claimed over any third-party assets.

Disclaimer:
This video is made using GTA 5, with Indian Bike Driving 3D assets added inside the game.

This is NOT actual gameplay of Indian Bike Driving 3D. Everything shown is custom-made using GTA mods. All characters and events shown in this video are fictional and created for entertainment purpose.
 
This is a fan-made, fictional, and transformative video that falls under Fair Use (Section 107) for commentary, parody, and storytelling.

Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for “fair use” for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education, and research.

Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statutes that might otherwise be infringing.

About : NessFit Gamer is a youtube channel, where you will find stories of gta 5 game in Hindi, I hope this video was entertaining and you like it, if you did smash the thumbs up button.

Special Credit to –  
Indian Bike Driving 3D – Rohit Gaming Studios  
GTA 5 – Rockstar Games

snippet.title: ZAYN - Die For Me (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Official music video for "Die For Me” by ZAYN from ‘KONNAKOL’, out April 17. 

Stream/download "Die For Me": https://zayn.lnk.to/dieforme
Pre-order ‘KONNAKOL’: https://zayn.lnk.to/KONNAKOL

See Zayn on THE KONNAKOL TOUR: https://inzayn.com/tour

Follow Zayn: 
https://tiktok.com/@zayn 
https://instagram.com/zayn   
https://twitter.com/zayn 
https://facebook.com/zayn 

Follow INZAYN: 
https://instagram.com/inzayn 
https://twitter.com/inzayn 
www.inzayn.com 

Video director: Ivanna Borin x Frank Borin
Video producer: Shayna Gianelli
Video editor: Ivanna Borin
Production Company : UnderWonder Content

Lyrics
Good times and bad times
I gave you my everything
I tried and I tried
To love you through anything
Swore to each other
We’d never be enemies
Why the fuck would you say that to me

Ain’t nothing worse than somebody who
Lies to your face and then swears it’s the truth
If you have a heart rip it up let it bleed

Cuz you said you would die for me
Say you would die for me
Say you would die for me

Don’t leave me now
When I need you the most
Gave you my heart
Don’t you dare let it go
say you would die for me
say you would die for me

Don’t leave me now
When I need you the most
Said you would die for me
said you never never let me go

2 am
You ain’t home
Call your friends
Said your gone
I’m not gonna wait up here
Go ahead and stay out ther
Oo
I’ll sleep just fine without you
Yeah yeah yea

Ain’t nothing worse than somebody who
Lies to your face and then swears it’s the truth
I love you, I love you, you said it out
Those empty words you were spitting out
You told me you love me
where are you now
Say you would die for me
Say you would die for me
Don’t leave me now
When I need you the most
Gave you my heart
Don’t you dare let it go

Say you would die for me
Say you would die for me
Don’t leave me now

When I need you the most
Said you would die for me
Said you’d never never let me go
Die for me
Say you would die for me
Say you would die for me
Don’t leave me now
When I need you the most
Said you would die for me
Said you never never let me go

#Zayn #DieForMe #KONNAKOL

Welcome back to another crazy GTA 5 adventure!
In this video, Franklin & Shinchan team up to collect RARE CURSED SUPERCARS hidden across Los Santos! 😱💀

These modded supercars aren’t normal—each one has strange powers, creepy designs, and insane surprises that will leave you shocked. From haunted engines to glitchy cursed vehicles, this GTA V mod is pure chaos and fun!

snippet.title: Ekdev Limbu - Mana Ko Haal [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Mana Ko Haal is a heartfelt portrayal of love, vulnerability, and the unspoken emotions that live quietly within us. Through raw melodies and sincere lyrics, we have tried to capture the fragile state of a heart caught between longing, hope, and truth. The visuals mirror this emotional journey, bringing to life moments of connection, distance, and reflection that many hearts will recognize as their own. 

Follow Ekdev:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ekdev.limbu/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EkdevLimbuThegim/

Listen to "Mana Ko Haal" now: https://ffm.to/manakohaal

Credits
Vocal, Composition & Lyrics: Ekdev Limbu
Cast: Mahek Shrestha

Audio Credits : 
Music Producer: Saswot Shrestha (Omniphonics Studio)
Mix and Master : Saswot Shrestha
Additional Composition / Lyrics: Dechen Phinasa, Salin Magar (Hook Studio)
Guitar: Bishal Chhetri, Bibek Rai
Drums: Neepesh Pariyar
Keys: Santosh Tamang

Video Credits : 
Directed by: Abhi Sampang Rai and Pragya Rai 
DOP: Ashesh Limbu, Prabin Mahato, Yogesh Rai (Chronicle Films)
Edit/Color: Bikesh Magar
Style/ MUA: Pragya Rai , Samasti Rai

Media Partner: Routine Of Nepali Music
Artist Manager: Bhaba Shrestha
Digital Manager: Ashim KC
For Business/Licensing inquiries: ekdevlimbu@gmail.com

Listen to Ekdev Limbu on:
▶︎ Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/1jJGnkMQFNsCoDimuhJgIf
▶︎ Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/np/artist/ekdev-limbu/1501675497
▶︎ YouTube Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLDIJJN1N159Y_ayrr8nM0Vl4dBS9wi8zK

© 2026, All Rights Reserved by Ekdev Limbu.

snippet.title: कलयुग के होली 2 | Guddu Rangila का पहला होली गीत 2026 | Kalyug Ke Holi 2 - New Bhojpuri Holi Song
snippet.description:
बुरा ना मानो होली है। "होली के रंग डाइमंड स्टार गुड्डू रंगीला के संघ" 
भरपूर देशी तड़का के साथ आ गइल बा।
खूब सुनि जा आ ढेर सारा प्यार आ आशीर्वाद दीहीं 🔥

Lyrics:-
             मुखड़ा-
कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता 
को०- कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता 
आरे सासे के गाथता हो सासे के गाथता 
को०- सासे के गाथता हो सासे के गाथता
आरे जाहवा ना नाथे के उहवा नाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता 
को०- कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता - 2
             अंतरा - 01
होली में अपना सागा बेटी के धोखा देके   
को०- बेटी के धोखा देके बेटी के धोखा देके
भाग गईल बिया राड़ी दमदे के लेके 
को०- दमदे के लेके हो दमदे के लेके 
होली में अपना सागा बेटी के धोखा देके   
भाग गईल बिया राड़ी दमदे के लेके
सासे के लहंगा में दमी काछता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता
को०- कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता - 2
               अंतरा - 02
हाय रे इ कलयुग कहवा ले जाई 
को०- कहवा ले जाई हो कहवा ले जाई
बेटी के खाना अब माईये रोज खाई 
को०- माई रोज खाई हो माई रोज खाई 
हाय रे इ कलयुग कहवा ले जाई 
बेटी के खाना अब माईये  रोज खाई 
ससुई के हो रोज खेतवा पाटता हो
दामदा सासे के गाथता
को०- कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता - 2

Lyrics for "Justin Bieber - What Do You Mean"

[Chorus]
What do you mean? Oh, oh
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move, but you tell me to go
What do you mean? Oh, what do you mean?
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean?
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean?
Better make up your mind, what do you mean?

[Verse 1]
You’re so indecisive of what I'm sayin'
Tryna catch the beat, make up your heart
Don't know if you're happy or complainin'
Don't want for us to end, where do I start?

[Pre-Chorus]
First you wanna go to the left, then you wanna turn right (Right)
Wanna argue all day, makin' love all night (All night)
First you're up, then you’re down, and then between ('Tween)
Oh, I really wanna know

[Chorus]
What do you mean? Oh, oh
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move, but you tell me to go
What do you mean? Oh, what do you mean?
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean?
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean? Better make up your mind
What do you mean?

[Verse 2]
You’re overprotective when I'm leavin'
Tryna compromise, but I can’t win
You wanna make a point, but you keep preachin'
You had me from the start, won't let this end

[Pre-Chorus]
First you wanna go to the left, then you wanna turn right
(Turn right)
Wanna argue all day, makin' love all night (All night)
First you're up, then you’re down, and then between ('Tween)
Oh, I really wanna know

[Chorus]
What do you mean? Oh, oh (Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah)
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? (Oh, what do you mean?) Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move, but you tell me to go
What do you mean? (I wanna know, ooh)
Oh, what do you mean? (Ooh)
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean? (Oh, baby)
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean? Better make up your mind
What do you mean? (Don't be so selfish, baby, yeah, yeah) Oh, oh
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? (You're so confusin', baby) Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move (Hey), but you tell me to go
What do you mean? (Be more straightforward)
Oh, what do you mean? (Hey, ah, ah, ah)
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean? (Hey, ah, ah, ah)
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean? Better make up your mind
What do you mean?

×=×=×=×=×

snippet.title: Maatrubhumi | Battle Of Galwan | Salman Khan, Chitrangada | Apoorva Lakhia | Himesh, Arijit, Shreya
snippet.description:
Maatrubhumi from Battle of Galwan is a tribute to the nation and to everyone who puts the country before themselves. With music composed by Himesh Reshammiya and vocals by Arijit Singh and Shreya Ghoshal, Maatrubhumi carries the weight of the story it represents.

#Maatrubhumi Song Out Now!
#SalmanKhan #BattleOfGalwan 

Full Song Available on:

Spotify -  https://bit.ly/4abo90N
YouTube Music  - https://bit.ly/3NDGhYv
Jio Saavn - https://bit.ly/4ah2i7h
Amazon Music - https://bit.ly/3Nun9fB
Apple Music - https://bit.ly/49SuGMF
Gaana - https://bit.ly/3NCCeM7 

Song Credits:

A Himesh Reshammiya Musical
Singer: Arijit Singh, Shreya Ghoshal & Master Mani Dharamkot
Music: Himesh Reshammiya
Lyrics: Sameer Anjaan
Music Arranged & Produced by: Meghdeep Bose
Musicians, Programmers & Backup Vocalists at Himesh Reshammiya Melodies: Suhas Parab, Subhash Parab, Barzin Contractor, Salman Shaikh & Anudutt Shamain.
Guitar: Ronny Satamkar
Violin: Raju Padhiyar
Flute: Lokesh Dadhich
Mixed & Mastered by: Salman Shaikh at Himesh Reshammiya Melodies Studio
Assistant Mixing Engineer: Anudutt Shamain
Himesh Reshammiya's Team: Rahul Sheth, Rajendra Toraskar, Prakash Serrao & Ravee Desae.

Salman Khan Films Presents - ‘BATTLE OF GALWAN’, directed by Apoorva Lakhia.
Produced by Salma Khan.
Starring Salman Khan and Chitrangada Singh

snippet.title: Ed Sheeran - Perfect (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
☀️Radio Paradise☀️

Subscribe and stay connected to what’s playing today.

📱Ed Sheeran - Perfect:
https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/track/0tgVpDi06FyKpA1z0VMD4v
https://youtu.be/cNGjD0VG4R8?si=T4A45O-LthAe-X2_

LYRIC
I found a love for me
Darling, just dive right in and follow my lead
I found a girl, beautiful and sweet
I never knew you were the someone waiting for me

'Cause we were just kids when we fell in love
Not knowing what it was
I will not give you up this time
Darling, just kiss me slow
Your heart is all I own
And in your eyes, you're holding mine

Baby I'm, dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
When you said you looked a mess
I whispered underneath my breath
But you heard it
Darling, you look perfect tonight

I found a woman, stronger than anyone I know
She shares my dreams, I hope that someday I'll share her home
I found a lover to carry more than just my secrets
To carry love, to carry children of our own

We are still kids, but we're so in love
Fighting against all odds
I know we'll be alright this time
Darling, just hold my hand
Be my girl, I'll be your man
I see my future in your eyes

Baby, I'm dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
When I saw you in that dress
Looking so beautiful
I don't deserve this
Darling, you look perfect tonight

Baby, I'm dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
I have faith in what I see
Now I know I have met an angel in person
And she looks perfect
I don't deserve this
You look perfect tonight

#EdSheeran #Perfect #Lyrics

Song: Namo Namo
Movie: Kedarnath
Singer: Amit Trivedi
Lyricist: Amitabh Bhattacharya

Crew:
Composed & Produced by Amit Trivedi
Recording Engineers A T Studios, Mumbai - Abhishek Sortey & Urmila Sutar  
Assisted by  Firoz Shaikh
Mixed & Mastered by Shadab Rayeen,  A T Studios & New Edge - Mumbai 
Assisted by Abhishek Sortey & Dhananjay Khapekar
Executive Producer A T Studios - Krutee Trivedi
Head Of Production A T Studios - Aashish Narula

Musician Names:
Programmed -  Amit Trivedi, Raja Rasaily & Krishna Kishor
Percussions - Krishna Kishor
Flute - Vishnu Vijay
Sitar - Kishor 
Mandolin & Strings - Seenu 
Backing Vocals - Rajiv Sundaresan & Suhas Sawant

RSVP & Guy In The Sky Pictures present #Kedarnath 
Starring: Sushant Singh Rajput, Sara Ali Khan, Nitish Bharadwaj, Alka Amin, Sonali Sachdev, Pooja Gor, Nishant Dahiya

Directed by: Abhishek Kapoor 
Produced by: Ronnie Screwvala & Pragya Kapoor 
Co-Produced by: Abhishek Kapoor & Abhishek Nayyar 
Story: Abhishek Kapoor & Kanika Dhillon 
Screenplay & Dialogue: Kanika Dhillon 
Music: Amit Trivedi 
DOP: Tushar Kanti Ray 
Action Director: Dave Judge & Sunil Rodrigues 
Editor: Chandan Arora 
Background Score: Hitesh Sonik 
Sound Designer: Allwin Rego & Sanjay Maurya.

Lyrics:
Jai Ho Jai Ho Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Aadi Dev Shankara
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Tere Jaap Ke Bina
(Bholenath Shankara)
Chale Ye Saans Kis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mera Karm Tu Hi Jaane
Kya Bura Hai Kya Bhalaa…
Tere Raaste Pe Main Toh
Aankh Moond Ke Chalaa…

Tere Naam Ki Jot Ne
Saara Har Liya Tamas Mera

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvarah

Srishti Ke Janam Se Bhi
(O O…)
Pehle Tera Vaas Tha
(O O…)
Ye Jag Rahe Ya Naa Rahe
(O O…)
Rahegi Teri Aastha
(O O…)

Kya Samay… Kya Pralay
Dono Mein Teri Mahaanta
Mahaanta… Mahaanta…

Seepiyon Ki Ontt Main
(Bholenath Shankara)
Motiyaan Ho Jis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Mere Mann Mein Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Basa Hai Uss Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mujhe Bharam Tha Jo Hai Mera
Tha Nahin Kabhi Mera…

Arth Kya Nirarth Kya
Jo Bhi Hai Sabhi Tera…
Tere Saamne Hai Jhuka
Mere Sar Pe Haath Rakh Tera
Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

Chandrama Lalaat Pe (O O…)
Bhasm Hai Bhujaaon Mein (O O…)
Vastra Baagh Chhaal Ka (O O…)
Hai Khadau Paanv Mein (O O…)

Pyaas Kya Ho Tujhe
Ganga Hai Teri Jataaon Mein
Jataaon Mein… Jataaon Mein…

Doosron Ke Waaste
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Sadaiv Hai Jiya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Maanga Kuch Kabhi Nahi
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tune Sirf Hai Diya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Samudra Manthan Ka Tha Samay Jo Aa Pada
Dwand Dono Lok Me Vish-Amrit Pe Tha Chhida
Amrit Sabhi Main Baant Ke
Pyala Vish Ka Tune Khud Piya

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

#NamoNamo #lordshiva #kedarnath

snippet.title: Manung Kotaima - Badri Sapkota | Shanti Shree Pariyar | Juna Gurung | New Nepali Song
snippet.description:
Presenting new Nepali song Manung Kotaima by Badri Sapkota & Shanti Shree Pariyar, penned & composed by Badri Sapkota, featuring Badri Sapkota & Juna Gurung only on Badri Sapkota's official YouTube channel.

Badri Sapkota Presents: New Nepali Song 2082

|| Manung Kotaima ||

Roshan Devkota
Sarjan Thapa Magar / Puran Magar & Team
Shailesh Sunam & Umbrella Resort, Manungkot

Lyrics: 
Lu hai Manungkotaima mero dil basyo lali othaimaa.
Lu hai manung kotaima najar nalagau lali othaima.

Pirati lam na ta Saili ghumna lai jamna ta.
Pirati launna ma Saila ekdine pauna sa.

Oi hoi damauli katesi madiko pool hitaiko mayalai gulab ko phool.

Ghara mero rukumai timi Mam pareu ukhumai.
Ghar mero tanahu ho launa ke bhanam bhanam bho.

Na rup maa khot timro sundar gulabi otha timro.
Ke hereu tesari o kho laaj lagyo besari.

O hoi marsyandi salala paniko bhel kisimai raichha ni mayako khel.

Tan ramro Mam ramro timi lajauda jhan ramro.
Jiu pani kasilo timro muharai hasilo.

Ke socheu bhanata timle paraichheu Manata.
Ma ta gurung ki chhori ho mero khyalmai dil chori bho.

Mila Asmaan Se Koi Noor Kohinoor Dastoor Mera
Lo Aaj Se Hua Main Sadiyon Ko Tera
 
Dekho Zara Dekho Naam Tera Likha Hai
Mera Hai Jo Mera Sab Tera Ho Chuka Hai
 
Dil Pe Ab Na Zor Koi
Har Qadam Teri Or Hai
Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Ab Phool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
Har Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Qubool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho

Qubool Teri Zid Hai Saari
Saari Baatein Qubool Hain
Qubool Saare Din Tumhaare
Siyah Raatein Qubool Hain
 
Tu Saaye-Baan Tu, Teri Chaanv Mein Khud Ko Bhulakar Jhoom Loon
Yoon Tera Hoon, Tu Dard De To Dard Ko Bhi Choom Loon
Muskuraana Hai Tujhi Se Tujhse hi Aaraam hai
Tu Nahi To Main Nahi Hoon
Zindagi Tere Naam Hai
Tu Na To Main Bemaaine
Hona Mera Hi Fizool Hai
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
 
Hai Ishq Mein Jab Doobe Hum
Gham Bhi Mile To Kaisa Gham
Tera Sahi Tera Ghalat
Tera Jhooth Bhi To Qubool Hai
Accha Bura Kya Tolna
Kya Mashwara Kya Sochna
Mahboob Hota Hai Khuda
Yahi Ishq Ka To Usool Hai

snippet.title: Minecraft Pro VS 1000 Players
snippet.description:
massive minecraft war

Minecraft Pro VS 1000 Players

Unstable SMP:
➜  @ParrotX2 
➜  ⁨@FlameFragsMC 
➜  ⁨@Spokeishere 
➜  ⁨@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @minutetechmc @LettuceK 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (bunch of the cool minecraft ost remixes)
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFCKUxeHEDpElmqZ2zl9aUQ (used the song Counterblade during the end battle!)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): The Trees have Eyes - Die Wälder Flüstern https://youtu.be/yZC0BlIePHM by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

we wa we wa

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

ॐ जय जगदीश हरे,
स्वामी जय जगदीश हरे ।
भक्त जनों के संकट,
दास जनों के संकट,
क्षण में दूर करे ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

जो ध्यावे फल पावे,
दुःख बिनसे मन का,
स्वामी दुःख बिनसे मन का ।
सुख सम्पति घर आवे,
सुख सम्पति घर आवे,
कष्ट मिटे तन का ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

मात पिता तुम मेरे,
शरण गहूं किसकी,
स्वामी शरण गहूं मैं किसकी ।
तुम बिन और न दूजा,
तुम बिन और न दूजा,
आस करूं मैं जिसकी ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

तुम पूरण परमात्मा,
तुम अन्तर्यामी,
स्वामी तुम अन्तर्यामी ।
पारब्रह्म परमेश्वर,
पारब्रह्म परमेश्वर,
तुम सब के स्वामी ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

तुम करुणा के सागर,
तुम पालनकर्ता,
स्वामी तुम पालनकर्ता ।
मैं मूरख फलकामी,
मैं सेवक तुम स्वामी,
कृपा करो भर्ता॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

तुम हो एक अगोचर,
सबके प्राणपति,
स्वामी सबके प्राणपति ।
किस विधि मिलूं दयामय,
किस विधि मिलूं दयामय,
तुमको मैं कुमति ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

दीन-बन्धु दुःख-हर्ता,
ठाकुर तुम मेरे,
स्वामी रक्षक तुम मेरे ।
अपने हाथ उठाओ,
अपने शरण लगाओ,
द्वार पड़ा तेरे ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

Om Jai Jagdish Hare,
Swami Jai Jagdish Hare.
The troubles of the devotees,
the troubles of the enslaved people,
Remove it in a moment.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

Those who meditate will get results,
A mind without sorrow,
Lord of sorrow without mind.
May happiness and wealth come home,
May happiness and wealth come home,
The pain of the body is gone.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

You are my mother and father,
Whose refuge is wheat?
Lord, whose refuge should I seek?
Without you and no one else,
Without you and no one else,
What should I hope for?
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

You are the perfect God,
you are the intrepid one,
Swami, you are the inner one.
Supreme God,
Supreme God,
Lord of all of you.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

You are an ocean of compassion,
You are the nurturer,
Master, you are the nurturer.
I am a fruitless fool,
I am a servant and you are a master.
Please fill me.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

You are an invisible one,
Lord of all,
Lord and creator of all.
In what way can I find mercy?
In what way can I find mercy?
To you I am Kumti.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

Dear friend, remover of sorrow,
Thakur you are mine,
Lord, you are my protector.
raise your hands,
take shelter,
The door is yours.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

om jay jagadeesh hare, svaamee jay jagadeesh hare . bhakt janon ke sankat, daas janon ke sankat, kshan mein door kare . . om jay jagadeesh hare... jo dhyaave phal paave, duhkh binase man ka, svaamee duhkh binase man ka . sukh sampati ghar aave, sukh sampati ghar aave, kasht mite tan ka . . om jay jagadeesh hare... maat pita tum mere, sharan gahoon kisakee, svaamee sharan gahoon main kisakee . tum bin aur na dooja, tum bin aur na dooja, aas karoon main jisakee . . om jay jagadeesh hare... tum pooran paramaatma, tum antaryaamee, svaamee tum antaryaamee . paarabrahm parameshvar, paarabrahm parameshvar, tum sab ke svaamee . . om jay jagadeesh hare... tum karuna ke saagar, tum paalanakarta, svaamee tum paalanakarta . main moorakh phalakaamee, main sevak tum svaamee, krpa karo bharta. . om jay jagadeesh hare... tum ho ek agochar, sabake praanapati, svaamee sabake praanapati . kis vidhi miloon dayaamay, kis vidhi miloon dayaamay, tumako main kumati . . om jay jagadeesh hare... deen-bandhu duhkh-harta, thaakur tum mere, svaamee rakshak tum mere . apane haath uthao, apane sharan lagao, dvaar pada tere . . om jay jagadeesh hare...

🎮 WELCOME TO PUBG MOBILE 141 BATTLE VERSE - ASIA CHAPTER III! 🎮

Asia’s ultimate PUBG MOBILE warzone is back - bigger, tougher, and loaded with nonstop action.
From January 8 to February 6, 27 elite squads clash across 3 intense phases to fight for glory, survival, and the crown.

Expect clutch plays, ruthless sprays, zone chaos, and insane momentum swings.
🔥 New legends will rise
🔥 Underdogs will surprise
🔥 Only ONE champion will conquer Chapter III

Gear up - the battle begins now.

snippet.title: Spending $8,367,853 To Survive Lava For Brainrots..
snippet.description:
Today I spent money to get the best brainrots in survive lava for brainrots! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: For Every Goal I Score, I Buy a UTOTY!
snippet.description:
I started with a full team of GOLD Players and attempted to build a FULL UTOTY SQUAD in just 6 Matches!

The rules are simple: For every goal I score in Head-to-Head, I get to upgrade one Gold Player to a 117+ OVR UTOTY Card. But there is a catch—I am currently at 50 Stars, meaning I have to score goals against the best players in FC Mobile to complete this team.

The stakes are huge! For every UTOTY player I fail to add by the end of the 6 matches, I am giving away 1 Star Pass to a subscriber. Did I manage to build the Ultimate Team, or did I end up giving away everything?

🔥 VIDEO HIGHLIGHTS:

-The Challenge: Gold Team vs. 50-Star H2H Opponents

-The MVP: Gold Cole Palmer carrying the squad!

-The Upgrades: Unlocking UTOTY Mbappe, Van Dijk & Saliba

-The Result: Building a 117 OVR Super Squad

ルールはシンプルです。ヘッド・トゥ・ヘッドでゴールを決めるごとに、ゴールド選手1名をOVR117以上のUTOTYカードにアップグレードできます。ただし、条件があります。現在スターが50なので、このチームを完成させるには、FCモバイルで最高の選手たちからゴールを決めなければなりません。

賭け金は莫大です！6試合終了までにUTOTY選手を追加できなかった場合、サブスクライバー1名にスターパスを1枚プレゼントします。果たしてUltimate Teamを編成できたのでしょうか？それとも全てを諦めてしまったのでしょうか？

te.title: నేను చేసే ప్రతి గోల్ కి, నేను ఒక యూటీ కొంటాను!
te.description:
నేను గోల్డ్ ప్లేయర్స్ తో కూడిన పూర్తి జట్టుతో మొదలుపెట్టాను మరియు కేవలం 6 మ్యాచ్‌లలో పూర్తి UTOTY స్క్వాడ్‌ను నిర్మించడానికి ప్రయత్నించాను!

నియమాలు చాలా సులభం: నేను హెడ్-టు-హెడ్‌లో చేసే ప్రతి గోల్‌కు, నేను ఒక గోల్డ్ ప్లేయర్‌ను 117+ OVR UTOTY కార్డ్‌గా అప్‌గ్రేడ్ చేయగలను. కానీ ఒక క్యాచ్ ఉంది—నేను ప్రస్తుతం 50 స్టార్‌ల వద్ద ఉన్నాను, అంటే ఈ జట్టును పూర్తి చేయడానికి నేను FC మొబైల్‌లోని ఉత్తమ ఆటగాళ్లపై గోల్స్ చేయాలి.

వాటాలు చాలా పెద్దవి! ప్రతి UTOTY ఆటగాడికి 6 మ్యాచ్‌లు ముగిసే సమయానికి నేను జోడించడంలో విఫలమవుతాను, నేను సబ్‌స్క్రైబర్‌కు 1 స్టార్ పాస్ ఇస్తున్నాను. నేను అల్టిమేట్ టీమ్‌ను నిర్మించగలిగానా లేదా చివరికి నేను ప్రతిదీ వదులుకున్నానా?

🔥 వీడియో హైలైట్‌లు:

- సవాలు: గోల్డ్ టీమ్ vs. 50-స్టార్ H2H ప్రత్యర్థులు

- MVP: గోల్డ్ కోల్ పామర్ జట్టును మోస్తున్నాడు!

ko.title: 골을 넣을 때마다 올해의 유토피아(UTOTY)를 하나씩 사요!
ko.description:
저는 모든 선수가 골드 등급인 팀으로 시작해서 단 6경기 만에 UTOTY 스쿼드를 완성하는 도전을 했습니다!

규칙은 간단합니다. 헤드투헤드 경기에서 골을 넣을 때마다 골드 선수 한 명을 117+ OVR UTOTY 카드로 업그레이드할 수 있습니다. 하지만 조건이 있습니다. 현재 제 스타는 50개뿐이라 FC 모바일 최고의 선수들을 상대로 골을 넣어야만 이 팀을 완성할 수 있습니다.

이 도전은 정말 중요합니다! 6경기 안에 UTOTY 선수를 완성하지 못할 때마다 구독자 한 분께 스타 패스 1개를 드립니다. 과연 저는 궁극의 팀을 완성하는 데 성공했을까요, 아니면 모든 걸 날려버렸을까요?

🔥 영상 하이라이트:

ru.title: За каждый забитый гол я покупаю UTOTY!
ru.description:
Я начал с полной команды золотых игроков и попытался собрать ПОЛНУЮ КОМАНДУ UTOTY всего за 6 матчей!

Правила просты: за каждый забитый гол в режиме «Один на один» я получаю возможность улучшить одного золотого игрока до карточки UTOTY с рейтингом 117+. Но есть подвох — у меня сейчас 50 звезд, а это значит, что мне нужно забивать голы лучшим игрокам FC Mobile, чтобы собрать эту команду.

Ставки высоки! За каждого игрока UTOTY, которого мне не удастся добавить к концу 6 матчей, я подарю 1 звездный пропуск подписчику. Удалось ли мне собрать идеальную команду, или я все раздал?

ta.title: நான் அடிக்கும் ஒவ்வொரு கோலுக்கும், நான் ஒரு யூட்டி வாங்குகிறேன்!
ta.description:
நான் கோல்ட் பிளேயர்களின் முழு அணியுடன் தொடங்கி 6 போட்டிகளில் ஒரு முழு யுடிஓடி அணியை உருவாக்க முயற்சித்தேன்!

விதிகள் எளிமையானவை: நான் நேரடியாகப் போராடி அடிக்கும் ஒவ்வொரு கோலுக்கும், ஒரு கோல்ட் பிளேயரை 117+ OVR யுடிஓடி அட்டையாக மேம்படுத்த முடியும். ஆனால் ஒரு கேட்ச் உள்ளது - நான் தற்போது 50 நட்சத்திரங்களில் இருக்கிறேன், அதாவது இந்த அணியை முடிக்க எஃப்சி மொபைலில் உள்ள சிறந்த வீரர்களுக்கு எதிராக கோல்களை அடிக்க வேண்டும்.

பங்குகள் மிகப்பெரியவை! ஒவ்வொரு யுடிஓடி வீரருக்கும் 6 போட்டிகளின் முடிவில் நான் சேர்க்கத் தவறினால், ஒரு சந்தாதாரருக்கு 1 ஸ்டார் பாஸை வழங்குகிறேன். நான் அல்டிமேட் அணியை உருவாக்க முடிந்ததா, அல்லது எல்லாவற்றையும் விட்டுக்கொடுத்தேனா?

🔥 வீடியோ சிறப்பம்சங்கள்:

-சவால்: கோல்ட் டீம் vs. 50-ஸ்டார் H2H எதிரிகள்

-எம்விபி: கோல்ட் கோல் பால்மர் அணியை சுமந்து செல்கிறார்!

Maar er is een addertje onder het gras: ik heb momenteel 50 sterren, wat betekent dat ik doelpunten moet maken tegen de beste spelers in FC Mobile om dit team compleet te maken.

es-US.title: ¡Por cada gol que marco, compro un UTOTY!
es-US.description:

Las reglas son sencillas: por cada gol que marque en un Cara a Cara, puedo mejorar un Jugador Oro a una Tarjeta UTOTY de 117+ OVR. Pero hay una condición: actualmente tengo 50 Estrellas, lo que significa que tengo que marcar goles contra los mejores jugadores de FC Mobile para completar este equipo.

¡Hay mucho en juego! Por cada jugador UTOTY que no consiga añadir al final de los 6 partidos, regalo un Pase de 1 Estrella a un suscriptor. ¿Conseguí construir el Equipo Ultimate o terminé regalándolo todo?

en.title: For Every Goal I Score, I Buy a UTOTY!
en.description:
I started with a full team of GOLD Players and attempted to build a FULL UTOTY SQUAD in just 6 Matches!

The rules are simple: For every goal I score in Head-to-Head, I get to upgrade one Gold Player to a 117+ OVR UTOTY Card. But there is a catch—I am currently at 50 Stars, meaning I have to score goals against the best players in FC Mobile to complete this team.

The stakes are huge! For every UTOTY player I fail to add by the end of the 6 matches, I am giving away 1 Star Pass to a subscriber. Did I manage to build the Ultimate Team, or did I end up giving away everything?

ar.title: مقابل كل هدف أسجله، أشتري سيارة UTOTY!
ar.description:
بدأتُ بفريق كامل من اللاعبين الذهبيين، وحاولتُ بناء فريق مثالي كامل في 6 مباريات فقط!

القواعد بسيطة: مقابل كل هدف أسجله في المواجهات المباشرة، أحصل على ترقية لاعب ذهبي إلى بطاقة لاعب مثالي بتقييم 117+. لكن هناك شرطًا: لديّ حاليًا 50 نجمة، ما يعني أن عليّ تسجيل أهداف ضد أفضل اللاعبين في FC Mobile لإكمال هذا الفريق.

الرهان كبير! مقابل كل لاعب مثالي لا أتمكن من ضمه بنهاية المباريات الست، سأمنح بطاقة نجمة واحدة لأحد المشتركين. هل نجحتُ في بناء الفريق المثالي، أم خسرتُ كل شيء؟

hi.title: मैं हर गोल पर एक यूटीओटी खरीदता हूँ!
hi.description:
मैंने गोल्ड प्लेयर्स की पूरी टीम के साथ शुरुआत की और सिर्फ 6 मैचों में अल्टीमेट टीम बनाने की कोशिश की!

नियम बहुत आसान हैं: हेड-टू-हेड मुकाबले में हर गोल के लिए, मुझे एक गोल्ड प्लेयर को 117+ OVR अल्टीमेट कार्ड में अपग्रेड करने का मौका मिलेगा। लेकिन इसमें एक पेंच है—मेरे पास अभी 50 स्टार हैं, यानी इस टीम को पूरा करने के लिए मुझे FC Mobile के सर्वश्रेष्ठ खिलाड़ियों के खिलाफ गोल करने होंगे।

दांव बहुत बड़ा है! 6 मैचों के अंत तक मैं जितने भी अल्टीमेट प्लेयर्स को अपनी टीम में शामिल नहीं कर पाऊंगा, हर एक के लिए मैं एक सब्सक्राइबर को 1 स्टार पास दूंगा। क्या मैं अल्टीमेट टीम बनाने में कामयाब रहा, या मैंने सब कुछ गंवा दिया?

🔥 वीडियो हाइलाइट्स:

-चुनौती: गोल्ड टीम बनाम 50-स्टार हेड-टू-हेड प्रतिद्वंद्वी

-सर्वश्रेष्ठ खिलाड़ी: गोल्ड कोल पामर ने टीम को जीत दिलाई!

iw.title: על כל שער שאני מבקיע, אני קונה UTOTY!
iw.description:

pa.title: ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰ ਗੋਲ ਲਈ, ਮੈਂ ਇੱਕ ਯੂਟੀਓਟੀ ਖਰੀਦਦਾ ਹਾਂ!
pa.description:
ਮੈਂ ਗੋਲਡ ਖਿਡਾਰੀਆਂ ਦੀ ਇੱਕ ਪੂਰੀ ਟੀਮ ਨਾਲ ਸ਼ੁਰੂਆਤ ਕੀਤੀ ਅਤੇ ਸਿਰਫ਼ 6 ਮੈਚਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਇੱਕ ਪੂਰਾ ਯੂਟੀਓਟੀ ਸਕੁਐਡ ਬਣਾਉਣ ਦੀ ਕੋਸ਼ਿਸ਼ ਕੀਤੀ!

ਨਿਯਮ ਸਧਾਰਨ ਹਨ: ਹੈੱਡ-ਟੂ-ਹੈੱਡ ਵਿੱਚ ਮੇਰੇ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਕੀਤੇ ਗਏ ਹਰ ਗੋਲ ਲਈ, ਮੈਨੂੰ ਇੱਕ ਗੋਲਡ ਪਲੇਅਰ ਨੂੰ 117+ OVR ਯੂਟੀਓਟੀ ਕਾਰਡ ਵਿੱਚ ਅਪਗ੍ਰੇਡ ਕਰਨਾ ਪੈਂਦਾ ਹੈ। ਪਰ ਇੱਕ ਕੈਚ ਹੈ—ਮੈਂ ਇਸ ਸਮੇਂ 50 ਸਟਾਰਾਂ 'ਤੇ ਹਾਂ, ਮਤਲਬ ਕਿ ਮੈਨੂੰ ਇਸ ਟੀਮ ਨੂੰ ਪੂਰਾ ਕਰਨ ਲਈ FC ਮੋਬਾਈਲ ਵਿੱਚ ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਵਧੀਆ ਖਿਡਾਰੀਆਂ ਦੇ ਵਿਰੁੱਧ ਗੋਲ ਕਰਨੇ ਪੈਣਗੇ।

ਦਾਅ ਬਹੁਤ ਵੱਡੇ ਹਨ! ਹਰੇਕ ਯੂਟੀਓਟੀ ਖਿਡਾਰੀ ਲਈ ਜੋ ਮੈਂ 6 ਮੈਚਾਂ ਦੇ ਅੰਤ ਤੱਕ ਜੋੜਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਅਸਫਲ ਰਹਿੰਦਾ ਹਾਂ, ਮੈਂ ਇੱਕ ਗਾਹਕ ਨੂੰ 1 ਸਟਾਰ ਪਾਸ ਦੇ ਰਿਹਾ ਹਾਂ। ਕੀ ਮੈਂ ਅਲਟੀਮੇਟ ਟੀਮ ਬਣਾਉਣ ਵਿੱਚ ਕਾਮਯਾਬ ਰਿਹਾ, ਜਾਂ ਕੀ ਮੈਂ ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਦੇ ਦਿੱਤਾ?

🔥 ਵੀਡੀਓ ਹਾਈਲਾਈਟਸ:

-ਚੁਣੌਤੀ: ਗੋਲਡ ਟੀਮ ਬਨਾਮ 50-ਸਟਾਰ H2H ਵਿਰੋਧੀ

-ਐਮਵੀਪੀ: ਗੋਲਡ ਕੋਲ ਪਾਮਰ ਟੀਮ ਨੂੰ ਲੈ ਕੇ ਜਾ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ!

-ਅੱਪਗ੍ਰੇਡ: UTOTY Mbappe, Van Dijk ਅਤੇ Saliba ਨੂੰ ਅਨਲੌਕ ਕਰਨਾ

-ਨਤੀਜਾ: ਇੱਕ 117 OVR ਸੁਪਰ ਸਕੁਐਡ ਬਣਾਉਣਾ

A pressão é enorme! Para cada jogador ÚNICO DO ANO que eu não conseguir adicionar até o final das 6 partidas, vou dar um Passe de Estrelas para um assinante. Será que consegui montar o Time Único ou acabei perdendo tudo?

fr-FR.title: Pour chaque but que je marque, j'achète une UTOTY !
fr-FR.description:
J'ai commencé avec une équipe entièrement composée de joueurs OR et j'ai tenté de constituer une équipe UTOTY complète en seulement 6 matchs !

Les règles sont simples : pour chaque but marqué en face-à-face, je peux améliorer un joueur OR en carte UTOTY 117+ GEN. Mais il y a un hic : je suis actuellement à 50 étoiles, ce qui signifie que je dois marquer contre les meilleurs joueurs de FC Mobile pour compléter cette équipe.

L'enjeu est de taille ! Pour chaque joueur UTOTY que je ne parviens pas à ajouter à mon équipe à la fin des 6 matchs, j'offre 1 Pass Étoile à un abonné. Ai-je réussi à constituer l'équipe ultime, ou ai-je tout donné ?

🔥 MEILLEURS MOMENTS VIDÉO :

- Le défi : Équipe OR contre adversaires 50 étoiles en face-à-face

- Le MVP : Cole Palmer (OR) porte l'équipe !

- Améliorations : Déblocage des joueurs UTOTY Mbappé, Van Dijk et Saliba

- Résultat : Création d'une Super Équipe à 117 de note générale

📩 Demandes commerciales → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

bn.title: আমি যে প্রতিটি গোল করি, তার জন্য আমি একটি UTOTY কিনি!
bn.description:
আমি গোল্ড প্লেয়ারদের একটি পূর্ণাঙ্গ দল দিয়ে শুরু করেছিলাম এবং মাত্র ৬ ম্যাচে একটি পূর্ণাঙ্গ ইউটিটি স্কোয়াড তৈরি করার চেষ্টা করেছিলাম!

নিয়মগুলো খুবই সহজ: হেড-টু-হেড-এ আমি যে প্রতিটি গোল করি, তার জন্য আমাকে একজন গোল্ড প্লেয়ারকে ১১৭+ ওভিআর ইউটিটি কার্ডে আপগ্রেড করতে হবে। কিন্তু একটা ক্যাচ আছে—আমি বর্তমানে ৫০ স্টারে আছি, অর্থাৎ এই দলটি সম্পূর্ণ করতে আমাকে এফসি মোবাইলের সেরা খেলোয়াড়দের বিরুদ্ধে গোল করতে হবে।

বাজি বিশাল! ৬ ম্যাচের শেষে আমি যে প্রতিটি ইউটিটি খেলোয়াড় যোগ করতে ব্যর্থ হই, তার জন্য আমি একজন গ্রাহককে ১ স্টার পাস দিচ্ছি। আমি কি আলটিমেট টিম তৈরি করতে পেরেছি, নাকি সবকিছুই দিয়ে দিয়েছি?

🔥 ভিডিও হাইলাইটস:

-চ্যালেঞ্জ: গোল্ড টিম বনাম ৫০-স্টার এইচ২এইচ প্রতিপক্ষ

-এমভিপি: গোল্ড কোল পামার স্কোয়াড বহন করছেন!

-আপগ্রেড: UTOTY Mbappe, Van Dijk এবং Saliba আনলক করা

-ফলাফল: একটি 117 OVR সুপার স্কোয়াড তৈরি করা

📩 ব্যবসায়িক অনুসন্ধান → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*
